creator: dale.woolridge@gmail.com
text:
I approve the patch.  thanks!

On Wed, 10 Jan 2007 12:34:20 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/ucspi-proxy,

> Please note that PR ports/107749 has just been submitted.

> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
